context_anchor: Wave A deterministic ETL 7 steps ~1-10k anúncios/mês; NO LLM in the loop

dimensions.evidence: Stack-native SQL/TS vs new abstraction tier
Direct SQL on job history vs LangSmith time-travel; LangGraph DX is great but doesn't pay off for deterministic ETL
$0 vs $109+/mês platform fees alone, ignoring LLM tokens
SQL semantics deterministic by construction; LangGraph supports but does not enforce determinism
BYO status-table pattern vs built-in checkpointer (between nodes)
Both fit comfortably; LangGraph cost-scales linearly
dimensions.source: boringsql pg_cron deep dive + LangGraph pricing

dimensions.evidence: Hand-off pattern (pg_cron triggers LangGraph subgraph for NLP only) is the AppFolio pattern — well-precedented but adds a hop; LangGraph already there
SQL + TS used daily; Python + graph model new

weighted_score.verdict: CONFIRM Wave 2 suggested winner — cron-Supabase puro in Wave A; LangGraph reserved for Wave B NLP step only
